mapper.select: select first_comment_id ,user_id ,writing_id ,text ,image_adder ,second_comment_amount ,like_amount ,create_time ,is_exist from First_Comment where writing_id=#{writingId} and is_exist=1 order by like_amount limit #{from},#{need}
mapper.update: update Question set is_exist=0 where user_id=#{userId} and question_id=#{questionId} and is_exist=1
